message:
fix(clippy): resolve all 10 clippy warnings in frankenterm-core lib

- ingest.rs: use clone_from instead of clone assignment
- pane_lifecycle.rs: use sort_by_key with Reverse instead of sort_by
- tantivy_query.rs: replace 6 sort_by closures with sort_by_key
- wal_engine.rs: add Eq derive to MuxMutation (already has PartialEq)
- simulation.rs: use u32::div_ceil instead of manual checked division
- proptest_search_bridge.rs: use to_bits() for f32 comparison

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
